title: Draw script glyphs + author OpenType GSUB/GPOS shaping for the target script
context: M2 script glyph drawing is blocked on the community partner and co-signed brief (fonts-script-201). Once the brief is co-signed, this is the core craft work: drawing the agreed glyph repertoire in UFO format, implementing the required OpenType GSUB/GPOS shaping rules, and verifying the result against community-provided test strings via HarfBuzz. Wrong forms can harm the community; the CI shaping gate and native-reader review (fonts-script-203) are mandatory before release.
objective: Draw the agreed script glyph set in UFO 3 + designspace as clean-room originals per the co-signed design brief, implement required OpenType GSUB/GPOS contextual forms, marks, and ligatures, and verify that HarfBuzz shaping is clean against community-provided test strings and that FontBakery passes.
acceptanceCriteria: Glyph set covers the agreed repertoire from the co-signed design brief (fonts-script-201); no glyphs added without community approval.
OpenType GSUB/GPOS features implement all required contextual substitutions, mark positioning, and ligatures for the script; authored in .fea format and validated against HarfBuzz.
HarfBuzz shaping diff is clean against the community-provided test string set; any diff is reviewed and approved by the community partner.
FontBakery Universal and GF profiles pass with no FAIL; WARNs triaged and documented.
provenance.json records every glyph source as original clean-room or community-provided reference with explicit permission; no proprietary derivation.
Variable weight axis (minimum) builds; static instances export correctly.
output: A pull request adding the UFO source, designspace, OpenType .fea shaping code, and built binaries for the community-co-designed script font, with provenance.json, passing FontBakery, and clean HarfBuzz shaping diff against community test strings.
